suggestions.title: App.jsx is 924 lines — extract components
suggestions.description: WorkerCard, StatsBar, ActivityLog, ProgressBar should each be their own file. This is the 5th time flagging. App.jsx is nearly 1000 lines and growing. Extract at minimum WorkerCard and StatsBar into separate modules.

suggestions.title: workers.json schema mismatch — no roster/workers wrapper
suggestions.description: App.jsx expects { workers: [], roster: [] } from fetchWorkersFromGitHub but workers.json is a flat array. setAllWorkers(data.workers ?? []) gets undefined when data is an array. This means the dashboard likely shows 0 workers despite the JSON having entries. Either wrap workers.json in {workers:[], roster:[]} or fix the destructuring.

suggestions.title: No ErrorBoundary — white screen on any render crash
suggestions.description: A single bad worker entry or undefined property will crash the entire app with no recovery. Add a React ErrorBoundary wrapper at minimum around the main content area. This has been flagged 5 times now.

suggestions.title: ActivityLog re-renders on every poll cycle
suggestions.description: ActivityLog receives the full entries array which changes reference every 30s fetch. Wrap ActivityLog in React.memo and memoize the filtered entries array to prevent unnecessary re-renders of 20+ DOM nodes.

suggestions.title: No loading state for activity log
suggestions.description: When activity fails to load, the error message is generic. Add a skeleton loader for the activity log section matching the worker card skeletons, and show a retry button inline.

suggestions.title: confetti-layer renders 30 spans every vibe upgrade
suggestions.description: The confetti burst creates 30 DOM elements that persist for 2.5s. Consider using CSS animation-fill-mode: forwards and removing the DOM nodes after animation completes, or use a canvas-based approach for better perf.

suggestions.title: Worker card flip has no keyboard trigger
suggestions.description: The info button flips the card, but there's no way to flip it back via keyboard without tabbing to the close button inside the flipped card. The card itself is focusable (tabIndex=0) but Enter/Space don't toggle the flip.

suggestions.title: Office floor characters lack click feedback
suggestions.description: Characters on the office floor are clickable (cursor: pointer) but provide no visual feedback on hover beyond the tooltip. Add a subtle scale transform or highlight ring on hover to signal interactivity.

suggestions.title: getRelativeTime duplicated in App.jsx and Office.jsx
suggestions.description: Both App.jsx (getRelativeTime) and Office.jsx (formatIdleDuration + inline ghost bubble logic) implement time-ago formatting independently. Extract to a shared utility in utils/time.js.

suggestions.title: Footer tagline quotes could rotate
suggestions.description: The footer shows a static quote per vibe. Since we already have VIBE_QUOTES in quotes.js, consider rotating the footer tagline every 30s for more personality.

suggestions.title: No way to see worker history beyond 3 entries on card back
suggestions.description: The flipped card only shows the last 3 activity entries. Consider a 'View all' link that scrolls to that worker's entries in the activity log, or expand to show more entries.

suggestions.title: Vacant desk nameplates could show role needed
suggestions.description: Vacant desks just say '📋 Vacant'. If the desk was previously occupied by a specific role, showing 'Vacant — Frontend' would add context about team capacity.
